final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring 神仙姐姐 holding a sign.

Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot, Douyin/TikTok livestream interface, photorealistic portrait
Composition: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, centered on host, phone screen mockup frame, livestream UI overlays visible
Subject: 神仙姐姐 (elegant female host), holding a rectangular sign with both hands, serene expression, soft makeup
Scene/backdrop: typical livestream room setting, soft blurred background with ambient lighting
Lighting/mood: warm ring light on face, soft diffused fill, intimate livestream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, neutral background, bright white sign for text contrast
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must look like an authentic Douyin livestream screenshot with viewer count and comment area UI elements
Avoid: watermark, distorted fingers, unreadable text, 8K stuffer labels, generic stock photo look
